mission.title: envoy: http: add HTTP/1.1 case preservation
mission.description:
1) Add new stateful header formatter extension point
2) Add preserve case formatter extension

Fixes https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/issues/14363

Risk Level: Low
Testing: New integration test
Docs Changes: Added
Release Notes: Added
Platform Specific Features: N/A

resolution.summary: @asraa @alyssawilk @jmarantz @snowp PTAL. I'm pretty happy with how this turned out. It's quite clean and the perf overhead when not in use should be negligible.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
